emails.subject: Calgary Office
emails.body: Calgary Office Was there a guy in the calgary office named John Distroll? Did some gas options maybe? -Greg

emails.subject: RE: Calgary Office
emails.body: RE: Calgary Office John Disturnal...... Why? To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: Calgary Office
emails.body: A guy from a bank in NY wants to talk to him about a job, but I think he's left the Company. You don't have an email or home phone do you? To: Woulfe, Greg
